abilities.name: Aegis
abilities.text: Once per activation. This model may reduce damage dealt to it by 1.

abilities.name: Flameborn
abilities.text: When this model would suffer damage from a Burning token, it instead heals that amount.

abilities.name: Hard to Kill
abilities.text: When this model suffers damage, if it has 2 or more health, it may not be reduced to below 1 health.

triggers.name: Cleansing Flame
triggers.text: Make an Inferno marker in base contact with the target and remove up to one token from the target.

triggers.name: Coordinated Attack
triggers.text: Another friendly model may declare a (melee) action targeting the same model.

actions.name: Breath of Fire
actions.effects: Deal this action's damage to a different enemy model within 2" of the target. Models damaged by this action gain a Burning token.

triggers.name: Flaming Leap
triggers.text: Deal this action's damage to an enemy model within 2" of the target that was not damaged by this action. Then, this model may be placed into base contact with a model that was damaged by this attack.

triggers.name: Kindle
triggers.text: Target must have a Burning token. Deal 1 damage to the target.

actions.name: Hovering Flame
actions.effects: Move this model up to 5", ignoring other models. Models moved through this way gain a Burning token.
